channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NUVOCO] Nuvoco Vistas to set up 1.5 MMTPA bulk cement terminal in Gujarat
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd's Board, in a meeting on April 14, 2026, approved the establishment of a bulk cement terminal at Viramgam, Sachana, Gujarat. This new terminal will feature a dedicated railway siding and boast a handling capacity of approximately 1.5 MMTPA. Its purpose is to facilitate efficient unloading, storage, and dispatch of both loose and packed cement, streamlining operations. The company intends for this terminal to serve as a strategic distribution hub, significantly expanding its market reach across Gujarat. Commissioning of the facility is targeted by the financial year 2027-2028.

  • Board approved a new bulk cement terminal in Gujarat.
  • Terminal capacity is approximately 1.5 MMTPA.
  • Includes a dedicated railway siding for efficiency.
  • Aims to expand market reach across the Gujarat market.
  • Targeted commissioning by FY 2027-2028.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [MINDSPACE] Mindspace REIT to host call on proposed Chennai asset acquisition
item.description:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT, through its Manager, K Raheja Corp Investment Managers Private Limited, will host a conference call on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, at 04:00 p.m. (IST). The purpose of the call is to discuss the proposed acquisition of assets located in Chennai. This conference call follows previous intimations on March 31, 2026, and April 14, 2026, regarding the same matter. Global dial-in details are provided for participants. A playback and transcript of the call will be made available on the Investor Relations section of the REIT's website for those unable to attend live.

  • Mindspace REIT to host conference call on April 15, 2026.
  • Call will discuss proposed acquisition of assets in Chennai.
  • This follows earlier intimations regarding the acquisition.
  • Playback and transcript will be available on the investor website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mindspace Business Parks REIT | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DRREDDY] Dr Reddy's Russia subsidiary fined RUB 9.27M by tax authority
item.description:
Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories LLC, Russia, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited, received a final penalty decision on April 13, 2026, from the Interdistrict Inspectorate of the Federal Tax Service of Russia. The penalty of RUB 9.27 million (INR 11.40 million) was levied for Value Added Tax (VAT) upon re-classification of marketing services as taxable. This final amount is significantly lower than the original quantified amount of RUB 20.09 million (INR 24.50 million). The company has evaluated the penalty and stated that it will have no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

  • Dr. Reddy's Russian subsidiary received a final tax penalty.
  • The penalty amounts to RUB 9.27 million (INR 11.40 million).
  • This is a reduction from the initial RUB 20.09 million demand.
  • The penalty is for VAT on re-classified marketing services.
  • Company assesses no material financial or operational impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DR.REDDY'S LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [PRESTIGE] Prestige Estates reports record FY26 sales of ₹3,00,245 Mn, collections ₹1,85,146 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Prestige Estates Projects Ltd announced its operational performance for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company achieved its highest-ever annual sales of ₹3,00,245 million in FY26, a 76% year-on-year growth, with total sales volume reaching 22.28 million square feet. Collections also hit a record ₹1,85,146 million, reflecting a 53% year-on-year growth. During the year, the company added new projects with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of over ₹5,00,000 million, enhancing its future growth pipeline. For Q4 FY26, sales stood at ₹76,973 million (11% YoY growth) and collections were ₹52,314 million (66% YoY growth). All segments, including Residential, Commercial, Retail, and Hospitality, demonstrated strong and consistent performance, with office occupancies over 90% and retail near 99%.

  • FY26 sales reached a record ₹3,00,245 million, up 76% YoY, with 22.28 million sq ft sold.
  • FY26 collections were highest-ever at ₹1,85,146 million, growing 53% YoY.
  • Added new projects with over ₹5,00,000 million GDV, strengthening future pipeline.
  • Q4 FY26 sales grew 11% YoY to ₹76,973 million; collections surged 66% YoY to ₹52,314 million.
  • Office and Retail portfolios maintained high occupancies of over 90% and 99% respectively.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRESTIGE ESTATES PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [NUVOCO] Nuvoco Vistas Board Approves Q4 & FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd's Board of Directors, at a meeting on April 14, 2026, approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company's Statutory Auditors, M/s. M S K A & Associates LLP, issued an unmodified opinion on these results. The approved financial results and auditor's reports are attached to the filing and are also available on the company's website. The date for the Annual General Meeting for FY26 will be intimated separately.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Statutory Auditors, M S K A & Associates LLP, issued an unmodified opinion.
  • Financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, were considered and approved.
  • The company will separately announce the date for its Annual General Meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PFC] PFC Consulting incorporates 4 SPVs for transmission projects
item.description:
PFC Consulting Limited (PFCCL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Power Finance Corporation Limited (PFC), has incorporated four Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) companies as its wholly-owned subsidiaries. These SPVs are Babai Transmission Limited, Bikaner Transmission Limited, Humnabad Power Transmission Limited, and Hebbani Power Transmission Limited. Their purpose is to undertake preparatory activities for independent transmission projects (ITPs) in Rajasthan and Karnataka, for which PFCCL has been nominated as the Bid Process Coordinator (BPC). These activities include survey, land acquisition, and forest clearance. As per Ministry of Power guidelines, these SPVs will be transferred to the successful bidders selected through a tariff-based competitive bidding process.

  • PFC Consulting Limited (PFCCL) incorporated four new wholly-owned SPVs.
  • SPVs will facilitate transmission projects in Rajasthan and Karnataka.
  • They will handle preparatory activities like land acquisition and surveys.
  • SPVs will be transferred to successful bidders post-competitive bidding.
  • This aligns with Ministry of Power guidelines for Independent Transmission Projects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWER FINANCE CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [NUVOCO] Nuvoco Vistas FY26 PAT up to ₹360 Cr; EBITDA up 35% to ₹1,881 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd announced its audited financial results for FY26, reporting a significant increase in Profit After Tax to ₹360 Cr from ₹22 Cr in FY25. Consolidated EBITDA grew 35% YoY to ₹1,881 Cr, driven by robust operational performance. Consolidated volume increased 5% YoY to 20.4 MMT, and total income rose 10% YoY to ₹11,362 Cr. The company's premiumisation improved to 43%. Nuvoco Vistas approved a new bulk cement terminal project in Sachana, Gujarat, with a 1.5 MMTPA capacity, targeting commissioning by FY28. Progress continues on Vadraj Cement facilities and a 4 MMTPA expansion in the East, aiming for a total capacity of 35 MMTPA by FY28. Management anticipates near-term margin impact from geopolitical uncertainties and higher costs.

  • FY26 Profit After Tax surged to ₹360 Cr from ₹22 Cr in FY25.
  • Consolidated EBITDA grew 35% YoY to ₹1,881 Cr.
  • Consolidated volume increased 5% YoY to 20.4 MMT.
  • Approved new 1.5 MMTPA bulk cement terminal in Gujarat by FY28.
  • Premiumisation improved to 43%, reflecting strong brand momentum.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SUNTECK] Sunteck Realty Board to meet on April 21 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Sunteck Realty Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will hold a meeting on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The agenda for the meeting includes the consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a dividend, if any, on the equity shares for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed until 48 hours after the results are declared, in accordance with insider trading regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 21, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Consideration of dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post-results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNTECK REALTY LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [POWERICA] Powerica Board to meet April 21, 2026, for Q3 & FY26 results
item.description:
Powerica Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 21, 2026. The meeting's agenda includes the consideration and approval of the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. Furthermore, the board will also consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. In connection with this, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities closed on April 2, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the conclusion of this board meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 21, 2026.
  • To consider Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
  • To approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 2, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Powerica Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RALLIS] Rallis India Board to meet Apr 27 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Rallis India Ltd's Board of Directors is scheduled to meet on April 27, 2026. The key agenda items for this meeting include the consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss and recommend a dividend, if any, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, which will then be presented for shareholder approval at the 78th Annual General Meeting. In compliance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for Designated Persons is closed from March 25, 2026, to April 29, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • To consider dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from March 25 to April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RALLIS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
